title: TikTok courts CMOs with first-ever Collective, as it targets bigger budgets
description: In its first CMO-focused event in the U.K. TikTok showcased how easy it is for brands to create content. The event is only part of the platform's sharper 2026 commercial strategy: targeting larger, long-term ad budgets, courting independent agencies, and positioning itself as a serious competitor to Meta in 2026.

title: Amid competition for sponsors, top sports clubs are investing in social media operations
description: Sponsors used to want hospitality access and pitch-side banners. Now they want access to a club's social following.

title: Rising gas prices could be the straw that breaks consumer spending
description: The rising fuel costs have experts predicting a rapid ripple effect on the U.S. retail industry.

title: YouTube is building infrastructure for the full creator-brand partnership life cycle
description: YouTube's Gemini-powered Creator Partnerships promises to alleviate pain points in the influencer marketing pipeline.

title: How to sell an influencer agency: Lessons from Digital Voices founderJennifer Quigley-Jones
description: Digital Voices founder and CEO Jennifer Quigley-Jones explains how to prepare and sell an influencer agency in today’s creator economy.

title: [AINews] Dreamer joins Meta Superintelligence Labs — 9 month retro of Personal Superintelligence
description: By now we’re pretty used to LS Pod guests going on to great success, but today’s news is fast for even us - Nat and Alex at MSL have execuhired Dreamer just days after we shipped their pod, barely 11 days after we recorded with them:

title: Use AI to Find Your Next Rental Car With Turo's ChatGPT App
description: Turo's ChatGPT app is the latest example of AI's rapid advance into every aspect of the automotive industry.

title: Elon Musk Unwraps $25 Billion Terafab Chip-Building Project
description: The project aims to build billions of chips and help make humankind a "galactic civilization," Musk says.

title: AT&T's New 2.0 Unlimited Plans Are More Affordable, Especially After Legacy Rate Hikes
description: AT&T's new plans offer more data for less money, even at the high end, due to upcoming legacy plan increases.

title: Simon Property Group CEO David Simon dies at 64
description: The real estate magnate’s son Eli Simon on Monday took over as CEO and president and will also continue as chief operating officer.

title: Brooks shuffles C-suite as it eyes expansion
description: The running brand is restructuring to focus global leaders on long-term priorities like market and category expansion.

title: Bark won’t go private, for now
description: The online pet company said one recent take-private proposal was withdrawn and another "did not adequately reflect the value of the company."
